<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This workspace demonstrates a Roslyn Source Generator. The generator project auto-generates a ToString() method for classes marked with a custom attribute. The consumer project references the generator and uses the generated code.
